title: Opening up
setting: You're with your partner on a quiet evening. You want to share a fear you've been carrying about your life here.

steps.speaker: Du
steps.es: (You want to open up about something hard. How do you start?)
steps.en: (You want to open up about something hard. How do you start?)

options.es: Cha ich der öppis säge, wo mi scho lang beschäftiget?
options.en: Can I tell you something that's been on my mind for a while?
options.feedback: Signals you're being vulnerable and invites her in gently. Lovely opening.

options.en: I have to tell you something.
options.feedback: Works, but it can sound ominous — a softer lead-in puts her at ease.
Don't pre-dismiss your own feelings — they're worth saying plainly.

steps.speaker: Partnerin
steps.es: Natürli. Du chasch mer alls säge. Was isch?
steps.en: Of course. You can tell me anything. What is it?

options.es: Mängisch han ich Angscht, ich ghör da nie würkli derzue.
options.en: Sometimes I'm afraid I'll never really belong here.
options.feedback: Honest and clear about the real fear. This is true intimacy.
You're backing away from what you opened. Trust her and say it.
Shutting down now leaves her worried and you unheard. Stay open.

steps.speaker: Partnerin
steps.es: Das ghör ich zum erste Mal. Verzell mer meh.
steps.en: This is the first I'm hearing of it. Tell me more.

options.es: Ich bi vo so wiit här. Mängisch fühl ich mi zwüschet zwei Wälte.
options.en: I'm from so far away. Sometimes I feel caught between two worlds.
options.feedback: You trust her with the full picture. That's how closeness deepens.
It is hard — but trying, even clumsily, means more than staying silent.

options.es: Lömmer's, ich wott der nöd de Aabig verderbe.
options.en: Let's drop it, I don't want to ruin your evening.
options.feedback: She wants to be there for you — don't protect her out of the moment.

steps.speaker: Partnerin
steps.es: Du ghörsch zu mir. Das isch dis Dehei, und ich bi da.
steps.en: You belong with me. This is your home, and I'm here.

options.es: Das z'höre bedütet mer mee, als du dänksch.
options.en: Hearing that means more to me than you know.
options.feedback: Receives her reassurance openly. A tender, honest close.

options.es: Merci. Ich han mi besser gfühlt, wenn ich's gseit han.
options.en: Thank you. I felt better once I'd said it.
options.feedback: Names the relief of opening up — affirms her listening was worth it.
Brushing off her warmth after she met you there is a missed moment.
